title: Measurement, SI Units, Dimensional Analysis, and Uncertainty · Quantity Clinic: Si Units
summary: Measure a room, select materials, convert specifications, and report tolerances for a community repair. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg si units increment in a unit-safe materials estimate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose appropriate SI base and derived units and write their symbols correctly.
Detect denominator switching, percentage-point confusion, and selective baselines in public claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Si Units evidence
steps.instruction: A rectangular working area measures 5 m by 3 m. Calculate its area. Use the result to decide Si Units for a unit-safe materials estimate.
steps.why: The Si Units result for a unit-safe materials estimate is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.
